steps.t: Amlan is in the Market Ward in the port-city of Pelargir. Daervunn asked you to help Amlan find maps of the river Anduin to help Aragorn with his jour…
Amlan did not yet search the crates in a small area in the north-eastern corner of the Market Ward, and they may contain the river-maps you seek.
Amlan is in the Market Ward, in Pelargir. You found some maps of the Anduin and should bring them to Amlan.
Orthonn is one of the lore-masters of the Grey Company, and can be found in the Court of the Ship-kings, in Pelargir. Amlan cannot read the maps of th…
Faeron is in the Court of the Ship-kings, in Pelargir. Ranger Faeron heard your conversation with Orthonn and has sought your attention.
Daervunn is at the Camp of the Grey Host, west of the port-city of Pelargir.
